since_last: 41% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.11%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.80% · Gold -0.23% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 41% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.11%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.11%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.93%
cards.body: Leaders: WDAY +3.65%, OKTA +2.74%, BIDU +2.74%, AVAV +2.31%, DLR +2.10%. Laggards: SKHY -6.93%, TSM -4.65%, MU -4.63%, ARM -4.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.20% at $135.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.20% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
